Introduction
    Emiliano Escamilla, a notorious swindler and impersonator, plans to avenge his mother, unjustly imprisoned for the crimes of his father, "El Mantequilla", the most famous and persecuted swindler of the 1950s.

Also known as: Butter Man: The Slickest Mexican Thief
